name: Liu Chan
page_title: Liu Chan 劉闡 [Liu Zhang, Shu, Wu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Liu Chan was from Jingling county, Jiangxia commandery. He was the younger son of Liu Zhang.

as Imperial Protector of Yizhou and stationed on the border of Jiaozhou and Yizhou. The Prime Minister, Zhuge Liang pacified the southern region and Liu Shan returned to Wu and became Palace Assistant Imperial Clerk. (1) From the Wu Shu: Liu Shan was very respectful to people. He was generous and affectionate with others. Thus he was a person of modesty. He died of sickness in his home.

(1) Liu Zhang’s SGZ

full_text:
Liu Chan 劉闡
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Chan (劉闡)was born in Jingling county, Jiangxia commandery. Described as affectionate and generous with other people. Liu Chan was affiliated with Liu Zhang, the Shu Kingdom, and the Wu Kingdom.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Liu Chan was from Jingling county, Jiangxia commandery. He was the younger son of Liu Zhang.
as Imperial Protector of Yizhou and stationed on the border of Jiaozhou and Yizhou. The Prime Minister, Zhuge Liang pacified the southern region and Liu Shan returned to Wu and became Palace Assistant Imperial Clerk. (1) From the Wu Shu: Liu Shan was very respectful to people. He was generous and affectionate with others. Thus he was a person of modesty. He died of sickness in his home.
